title: Heidi Shannon
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Shannon}}
'''Heidi Shannon''' is a voice actress, making her debut with the Mask cartoon TV series, but afterwards concentrated on video game voicing. Her work includes several Star Wars titles. Most notable is the voicing of [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] in ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]'' and ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''.

{{Bio-stub}}

==Star Wars Filmography==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]'' – Mara Jade
*[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|'' The Phantom Menace'']] – Brat, Computer Console, [[DC-10]], Female Thug, [[Jira/Legends|Jira]]
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' – [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|A-wing]] Pilot #1, Kalaan Militiaman #2
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' – [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]], [[Seraph-class urban landspeeder|Flash Speeder]] driver, Heavy lifter pilot

==Other Filmography==
*''Baldur's Gate'' – Jaheira
*''Baldur's Gate: Tales of the Sword Coast'' – Jaheira
*''Baldur's Gate II: Shadows of Amn'' – Jaheira
*''Baldur's Gate II: Throne of Bhaal'' – Jaheira
